title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nivea India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Nivea India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!
